9 payments to QuickFix Consulting (V021, new vendor) between Oct-Dec, all betwee

9 payments to QuickFix Consulting (V021, new vendor) between Oct-Dec, all between $4,750 and $4,990 (just under $5,000 approval threshold). Total ~$43,800. Vendor was onboarded 2025-09-28 with no prior history. Possible structuring to avoid management approval. Recommend immediate investigation.

Findings Summary: 9 payments to QuickFix Consulting (V021, new vendor) between Oct-Dec, all between $4,750 and $4,990 (just under $5,000 approval threshold). Total ~$43,800. Vendor was onboarded 2025-09-28 with no prior history. Possible structuring to avoid management approval. Recommend immediate investigation.
Escalate to management; initiate fraud investigation
